goal: To make homemade onion rings, here are the steps and the times needed for each step:
steps:
Step 1.Peel the onion and slice it 1/4-inch (6.35mm) thick. (5 min)
Step 2. Add the onion rings to a bowl of ice water and let stand for 30 minutes. (30 min)
Step 3. Place the rings onto paper towels to dry. (5 min)
Step 4. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into a mixing bowl and set aside. (2 min)
Step 5. Separate the egg. (1 min)
Step 6. Add the egg yolk to a small bowl and lightly beat. (1 min)
Step 7. Add the beaten egg yolk, milk, and 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the flour mixture. (2 min)
Step 8. Add the egg white to another mixing bowl and beat until stiff. (5 min)
Step 9. Fold the egg white into the batter. (2 min)
Step 10. Preheat 1 inch (2.5cm) of vegetable oil to 375°F/190°C. (10 min)
Step 11. Dip the onion rings in the batter. (2 min)
Step 12. Cook the onion rings until golden. (7 min)
Step 13. Remove the onion rings using tongs or a similar long-handled implement. (1 min)
Step 14. Finished. (0 min)
constraints:
• Step 1 must precede Step 2.
• Step 10 must precede Step 11.
• Step 11 must precede Step 12.
• Step 12 must precede Step 13.
• Step 13 must precede Step 14.
